response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development and some experience with performance optimization, but lacks direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, AI/deep-learning workload expertise, and hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Strong experience in software development with multiple programming languages
Experience with performance optimization in various projects
Background in creating testable projects and sharing knowledge through workshops and talks
concerns: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
No clear experience in AI/deep-learning workload expertise

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
